commits.message:
feat(site): Comprehensive demos covering all components and hooks

24 demos covering every exported component and hook:
- Panel (box styles, markup), Table (full featured), Tree (deep nesting)
- Markup (all style attributes), Rule (alignment, custom chars)
- Syntax (TypeScript), Markdown, JSON (sorted), Pretty (indent guides)
- Columns, Traceback
- Spinners (all styles), Status, ProgressBar (animated), Progress (multi-task)
- useSpinnerFrame, useRichRenderable hooks
- Interactive: RichPrompt, RichConfirm, RichSelect
- Theme/ColorSystem
- Compound: Dashboard, File Explorer

Also adds all hooks and interactive components to eval scope,
and handles component-definition pattern (function + return) in editor.
